observation_window.note: Evidence collected during single sample capture session

status.reason: Valid, no active challenges, not superseded.

reliance.label: Signed, partial coverage
reliance.verdict: This passport provides Ed25519-signed, machine-verifiable integrity and partial coverage evidence for a redacted sample of the AcmeSaaS AI Support Workflow. Suitable for internal review and bounded third-party assessment within scope. Reliance is constrained by incomplete call-site coverage and self-reported model attribution.
limits: Coverage is partial: 4 of 5 identified call sites
Evidence applies to a redacted sample, not full production deployment
Model version attribution is self-reported by integration, not independently verified
No legal or regulatory conclusions are made
reliance.freshness_note: Passport issued within the last 30 days and not past valid_until. This does not guarantee the underlying system has not changed since issuance.

subject.name: AcmeSaaS AI Support Workflow
subject.description: AI-powered customer support workflow: ticket classification, response generation, sentiment analysis, and escalation routing.

not_covered: Admin escalation override call site (not instrumented in this sample)
not_observed: Live production infrastructure beyond the redacted sample boundary
not_concluded: Legal or regulatory compliance — this passport provides evidence, not legal conclusions
boundary_notes: Evidence covers a redacted commercial sample, not a full production deployment.
Coverage is partial: 4 of 5 identified AI call sites are instrumented.

claims.assertion: The proof artifact can be verified offline without network access or external service calls.
4 of 5 identified AI call sites produce receipted evidence.
claims.qualification: Coverage is partial by design — this is a redacted sample.
claims.boundary: Admin escalation override call site is not instrumented in this sample.

claims.assertion: All receipts in the proof pack pass SHA-256 hash-chain integrity verification.
Each AI call site identifies the model provider and model version used.
claims.qualification: Model version is self-reported by the integration.
claims.boundary: Not independently verified by Assay. If upstream adapter misreports, this claim may be false.

what_is_checked: passport_id matches SHA-256 of passport body (content-addressed identity)
Referenced proof pack passes integrity verification
No active challenge, supersession, or revocation receipts in passport directory

what_happens: A timestamped challenge receipt is created in the passport directory.
Passport status becomes CHALLENGED on next verification.
The challenge reason and timestamp are immutably recorded.
The issuer can respond by superseding (issuing a new passport that addresses the challenge) or revoking.

coverage.discovery_note: Call sites declared in SCOPE_MANIFEST.json by system integrator. Not independently discovered by static analysis or runtime instrumentation.

provenance.verification_note: Coverage status determined by presence of matching receipts in proof pack. Missing sites confirmed by absence.

call_sites.reason: Not instrumented in this redacted sample
